test_patch:
diff --git a/core/agents/lastfm/agent_test.go b/core/agents/lastfm/agent_test.go
index c4154826..9d909c54 100644
--- a/core/agents/lastfm/agent_test.go
+++ b/core/agents/lastfm/agent_test.go
@@ -10,14 +10,10 @@ import (
 	"strconv"
 	"time"
 
-	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/core/scrobbler"
-
-	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/model/request"
-
-	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/model"
-
 	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/conf"
 	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/core/agents"
+	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/core/scrobbler"
+	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/model"
 	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/tests"
 	. "github.com/onsi/ginkgo"
 	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
@@ -232,8 +228,7 @@ var _ = Describe("lastfmAgent", func() {
 		var httpClient *tests.FakeHttpClient
 		var track *model.MediaFile
 		BeforeEach(func() {
-			ctx = request.WithUser(ctx, model.User{ID: "user-1"})
-			_ = ds.UserProps(ctx).Put(sessionKeyProperty, "SK-1")
+			_ = ds.UserProps(ctx).Put("user-1", sessionKeyProperty, "SK-1")
 			httpClient = &tests.FakeHttpClient{}
 			client := NewClient("API_KEY", "SECRET", "en", httpClient)
 			agent = lastFMConstructor(ds)
@@ -304,6 +299,61 @@ var _ = Describe("lastfmAgent", func() {
 				Expect(err).ToNot(HaveOccurred())
 				Expect(httpClient.SavedRequest).To(BeNil())
 			})
+
+			It("truncates scrobbles exceeding the maximum batch size", func() {
+				var many []scrobbler.Scrobble
+				for i := 0; i < 100; i++ {
+					many = append(many, scrobbler.Scrobble{
+						MediaFile: *track,
+						TimeStamp: time.Unix(int64(i), 0),
+					})
+				}
+
+				httpClient.Res = http.Response{Body: ioutil.NopCloser(bytes.NewBufferString("{}")), StatusCode: 200}
+				err := agent.Scrobble(ctx, "user-1", many)
+
+				Expect(err).ToNot(HaveOccurred())
+				Expect(httpClient.RequestCount).To(Equal(80))
+
+				for i := 0; i < 80; i++ {
+					Expect(httpClient.Requests[i].URL.Query().Get("timestamp")).To(Equal(strconv.FormatInt(int64(79-i), 10)))
+				}
+			})
+
+			It("processes all scrobbles when below the maximum", func() {
+				var few []scrobbler.Scrobble
+				for i := 0; i < 60; i++ {
+					few = append(few, scrobbler.Scrobble{MediaFile: *track, TimeStamp: time.Now()})
+				}
+
+				httpClient.Res = http.Response{Body: ioutil.NopCloser(bytes.NewBufferString("{}")), StatusCode: 200}
+				err := agent.Scrobble(ctx, "user-1", few)
+
+				Expect(err).ToNot(HaveOccurred())
+				Expect(httpClient.RequestCount).To(Equal(60))
+			})
+
+			It("sorts scrobbles by timestamp ascending before submitting", func() {
+				timestamps := []int64{500, 300, 100, 400, 200}
+				var unordered []scrobbler.Scrobble
+				for _, ts := range timestamps {
+					unordered = append(unordered, scrobbler.Scrobble{
+						MediaFile: *track,
+						TimeStamp: time.Unix(ts, 0),
+					})
+				}
+
+				httpClient.Res = http.Response{Body: ioutil.NopCloser(bytes.NewBufferString("{}")), StatusCode: 200}
+				err := agent.Scrobble(ctx, "user-1", unordered)
+
+				Expect(err).ToNot(HaveOccurred())
+				Expect(httpClient.RequestCount).To(Equal(5))
+
+				expectedOrder := []string{"500", "400", "300", "200", "100"}
+				for i, expected := range expectedOrder {
+					Expect(httpClient.Requests[i].URL.Query().Get("timestamp")).To(Equal(expected))
+				}
+			})
 		})
 	})
 
diff --git a/core/agents/lastfm/lastfm_suite_test.go b/core/agents/lastfm/lastfm_suite_test.go
index 9be5fabe..b3e3e7fe 100644
--- a/core/agents/lastfm/lastfm_suite_test.go
+++ b/core/agents/lastfm/lastfm_suite_test.go
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ import (
 	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
 )
 
+// TestLastFM is the Ginkgo entry point for all specs in package lastfm (agent, client, auth router, etc.).
 func TestLastFM(t *testing.T) {
 	tests.Init(t, false)
 	log.SetLevel(log.LevelCritical)
diff --git a/persistence/persistence_suite_test.go b/persistence/persistence_suite_test.go
index 3aeb39a3..15398c3a 100644
--- a/persistence/persistence_suite_test.go
+++ b/persistence/persistence_suite_test.go
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ import (
 	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
 )
 
+// TestPersistence is the Ginkgo entry point for all specs in package persistence (repositories, migrations-backed stores, etc.).
 func TestPersistence(t *testing.T) {
 	tests.Init(t, true)
 
diff --git a/persistence/user_props_repository_test.go b/persistence/user_props_repository_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..7aef49c1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/persistence/user_props_repository_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,64 @@
+package persistence
+
+import (
+	"context"
+
+	"github.com/astaxie/beego/orm"
+	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/log"
+	"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/model"
+	. "github.com/onsi/ginkgo"
+	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
+)
+
+var _ = Describe("UserPropsRepository", func() {
+	var repo model.UserPropsRepository
+	bareCtx := context.Background()
+
+	BeforeEach(func() {
+		repo = NewUserPropsRepository(log.NewContext(bareCtx), orm.NewOrm())
+	})
+
+	It("uses explicit userId when context has no authenticated user", func() {
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-ctx-a", "prop-key", "val-a")).To(BeNil())
+		got, err := repo.Get("u-props-ctx-a", "prop-key")
+		Expect(err).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(got).To(Equal("val-a"))
+	})
+
+	It("isolates rows per userId for the same key", func() {
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-iso-1", "shared-key", "one")).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-iso-2", "shared-key", "two")).To(BeNil())
+		v1, err := repo.Get("u-props-iso-1", "shared-key")
+		Expect(err).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(v1).To(Equal("one"))
+		v2, err := repo.Get("u-props-iso-2", "shared-key")
+		Expect(err).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(v2).To(Equal("two"))
+	})
+
+	It("DefaultGet returns the default when the row is missing", func() {
+		got, err := repo.DefaultGet("u-props-missing", "no-such-key", "fallback")
+		Expect(err).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(got).To(Equal("fallback"))
+	})
+
+	It("Delete removes only the row for the given userId", func() {
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-del-a", "k-del", "keep-other")).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-del-b", "k-del", "stay")).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(repo.Delete("u-props-del-a", "k-del")).To(BeNil())
+		_, err := repo.Get("u-props-del-a", "k-del")
+		Expect(err).To(Equal(model.ErrNotFound))
+		v, err := repo.Get("u-props-del-b", "k-del")
+		Expect(err).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(v).To(Equal("stay"))
+	})
+
+	It("Put updates the value when userId and key already exist", func() {
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-upd", "k-upd", "first")).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(repo.Put("u-props-upd", "k-upd", "second")).To(BeNil())
+		v, err := repo.Get("u-props-upd", "k-upd")
+		Expect(err).To(BeNil())
+		Expect(v).To(Equal("second"))
+	})
+})
+
diff --git a/tests/fake_http_client.go b/tests/fake_http_client.go
index 88f0e95a..59bc2e0d 100644
--- a/tests/fake_http_client.go
+++ b/tests/fake_http_client.go
@@ -1,19 +1,39 @@
 package tests
 
-import "net/http"
+import (
+	"bytes"
+	"io"
+	"net/http"
+)
 
 type FakeHttpClient struct {
 	Res          http.Response
 	Err          error
 	SavedRequest *http.Request
+	Requests     []*http.Request
 	RequestCount int
+	// bodySnapshot holds a copy of Res.Body after first read so every Do() can return a fresh Reader (http.Response.Body is single-use).
+	bodySnapshot []byte
 }
 
 func (c *FakeHttpClient) Do(req *http.Request) (*http.Response, error) {
 	c.RequestCount++
 	c.SavedRequest = req
+	c.Requests = append(c.Requests, req)
 	if c.Err != nil {
 		return nil, c.Err
 	}
-	return &c.Res, nil
+	resp := c.Res
+	if c.Res.Body != nil {
+		if c.bodySnapshot == nil {
+			var err error
+			c.bodySnapshot, err = io.ReadAll(c.Res.Body)
+			_ = c.Res.Body.Close()
+			if err != nil {
+				return nil, err
+			}
+		}
+		resp.Body = io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader(c.bodySnapshot))
+	}
+	return &resp, nil
 }
diff --git a/tests/mock_user_props_repo.go b/tests/mock_user_props_repo.go
index 71aa2c1b..7fa581bb 100644
--- a/tests/mock_user_props_repo.go
+++ b/tests/mock_user_props_repo.go
@@ -4,9 +4,8 @@ import "github.com/navidrome/navidrome/model"
 
 type MockedUserPropsRepo struct {
 	model.UserPropsRepository
-	UserID string
-	data   map[string]string
-	err    error
+	data map[string]string
+	err  error
 }
 
 func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) init() {
@@ -15,44 +14,44 @@ func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) init() {
 	}
 }
 
-func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) Put(key string, value string) error {
+func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) Put(userId, key string, value string) error {
 	if p.err != nil {
 		return p.err
 	}
 	p.init()
-	p.data[p.UserID+"_"+key] = value
+	p.data[userId+key] = value
 	return nil
 }
 
-func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) Get(key string) (string, error) {
+func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) Get(userId, key string) (string, error) {
 	if p.err != nil {
 		return "", p.err
 	}
 	p.init()
-	if v, ok := p.data[p.UserID+"_"+key]; ok {
+	if v, ok := p.data[userId+key]; ok {
 		return v, nil
 	}
 	return "", model.ErrNotFound
 }
 
-func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) Delete(key string) error {
+func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) Delete(userId, key string) error {
 	if p.err != nil {
 		return p.err
 	}
 	p.init()
-	if _, ok := p.data[p.UserID+"_"+key]; ok {
-		delete(p.data, p.UserID+"_"+key)
+	if _, ok := p.data[userId+key]; ok {
+		delete(p.data, userId+key)
 		return nil
 	}
 	return model.ErrNotFound
 }
 
-func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) DefaultGet(key string, defaultValue string) (string, error) {
+func (p *MockedUserPropsRepo) DefaultGet(userId, key string, defaultValue string) (string, error) {
 	if p.err != nil {
 		return "", p.err
 	}
 	p.init()
-	v, err := p.Get(p.UserID + "_" + key)
+	v, err := p.Get(userId, key)
 	if err != nil {
 		return defaultValue, nil
 	}
 	return v, nil
 }
